hero_heading: Use artificial intelligence smartly – and correctly
hero_lead: Learn how to use AI as a support in your studies – without breaking the rules.
why_matters: Why this is important for you as a student
why_matters_text: AI can save you time and help you learn better – but it's important to use it correctly. Incorrect use can have serious academic consequences, such as annulled exams or expulsion.
get_started_lead: Follow the steps to use AI in a responsible and effective way.
step_1_text: Read the most common questions about AI and academic integrity, so you know what is allowed.
step_2_text: See concrete examples of how to use AI to structure text and avoid plagiarism.
step_3_text: Check if you can distinguish between legal and illegal AI use.
search_lead: Search for topics across all pages (e.g., 'exam', 'plagiarism', 'prompt').
footer_text: Made for students — Group 5 — Practical Project Work — Spring 2026
